live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

client_token.description: The client token of the account collection flow.  This token can be used to embed account collection in your client-side application.

status.description: The current status of the account collection flow. One of `pending`, `completed`, `expired`, or `cancelled`.

counterparty_id.description: The ID of a counterparty. An external account created with this flow will be associated with this counterparty.

external_account_id.description: If present, the ID of the external account created using this flow.

items.description: An account created with this flow will support payments of one of these types.
An account created with this flow will support wires from the US to these countries.
